languages.text: Спустя несколько лет Простор содрогнулся под натиском вражеских орд. Повинуясь приказам своих надменных владык, гробницы давно сгинувшей цивилизации пробуждались, чтобы вновь привести к повиновению низшие расы и править железной рукой. Победа над врагом, не знающим ни слабости, ни страха, обескровила и династию Винтерскейл, и династию Чорда. Лишь протекторат фон Валанциус неведомым образом устоял без потерь под натиском ксеносов, и слухи о том, что Вольный Торговец неким непостижимым образом сумел договориться с их предводителями, много десятков лет будоражили умы выживших.

A few years later, the Expanse quaked under the onslaught of enemy hordes. Heeding the orders of their arrogant overlords, the tombs of a long-dead civilisation awakened to bring the inferior races back into submission and rule with an iron hand. Victory over an enemy that knew neither weakness nor fear drove both the Winterscale and Chorda dynasties to the brink of extinction. Only the von Valancius protectorate survived the xenos unscathed, and rumours that the Rogue Trader had somehow managed to negotiate with their leaders plagued the minds of the survivors for decades after.

Heeding the orders of their arrogant overlords, the tombs of a long-dead civilisation awakened to bring the inferior races back into submission and rule with an iron hand. Victory over an enemy that knew neither weakness nor fear drove both the Winterscale and Chorda dynasties to the brink of extinction. Only the von Valancius protectorate survived the xenos unscathed, and rumours that the Rogue Trader had somehow managed to negotiate with their leaders plagued the minds of the survivors for decades after.

languages.text: 数年の後、エクスパンスは敵の群れに襲われ、激戦を繰り広げた。傲慢な支配者たちの命令に従い、古代文明の墓は蘇り、劣った種族を再び従わせ、鉄の拳で支配しようとした。弱さや恐怖を知らない敵を打ち破った勝利は、ウィンタースケイルとコルダ両王朝を滅亡の淵に追いやった。フォン・ヴァランシウス保護領のみが異星生物の襲撃を生き延びたが、その後の数十年間、ローグ・トレーダーが異星生物の指導者たちと交渉したという噂が生き残った者たちの心に根強く残った。
languages.original_text: A few years later, the Expanse quaked under the onslaught of enemy hordes. Heeding the orders of their arrogant overlords, the tombs of a long-dead civilisation awakened to bring the inferior races back into submission and rule with an iron hand. Victory over an enemy that knew neither weakness nor fear drove both the Winterscale and Chorda dynasties to the brink of extinction. Only the von Valancius protectorate survived the xenos unscathed, and rumours that the Rogue Trader had somehow managed to negotiate with their leaders plagued the minds of the survivors for decades after.

traits.locale_text: 数年の後、エクスパンスは敵の群れに襲われ、激戦を繰り広げた。傲慢な支配者たちの命令に従い、古代文明の墓は蘇り、劣った種族を再び従わせ、鉄の拳で支配しようとした。弱さや恐怖を知らない敵を打ち破った勝利は、ウィンタースケイルとコルダ両王朝を滅亡の淵に追いやった。フォン・ヴァランシウス保護領のみが異星生物の襲撃を生き延びたが、その後の数十年間、ローグ・トレーダーが異星生物の指導者たちと交渉したという噂が生き残った者たちの心に根強く残った。

languages.text: 几年后，扩区在大批敌军的猛攻下摇摇欲坠。遵照其傲慢统治者的命令，一个早已消亡的文明从墓穴中苏醒，试图让所有低等种族重新臣服，再加以铁腕统治。为了战胜这个不知疲倦也不知恐惧的敌人，温特斯凯尔和库尔达两大王朝被逼到了灭亡边缘，唯有冯·瓦兰修斯属地在异形入侵中安然无恙。有传言说，行商浪人不知用什么手段，和异形首领达成了交易。这个说法盘踞幸存者们的内心长达数十年之久。
languages.original_text: A few years later, the Expanse quaked under the onslaught of enemy hordes. Heeding the orders of their arrogant overlords, the tombs of a long-dead civilisation awakened to bring the inferior races back into submission and rule with an iron hand. Victory over an enemy that knew neither weakness nor fear drove both the Winterscale and Chorda dynasties to the brink of extinction. Only the von Valancius protectorate survived the xenos unscathed, and rumours that the Rogue Trader had somehow managed to negotiate with their leaders plagued the minds of the survivors for decades after.

traits.locale_text: 几年后，扩区在大批敌军的猛攻下摇摇欲坠。遵照其傲慢统治者的命令，一个早已消亡的文明从墓穴中苏醒，试图让所有低等种族重新臣服，再加以铁腕统治。为了战胜这个不知疲倦也不知恐惧的敌人，温特斯凯尔和库尔达两大王朝被逼到了灭亡边缘，唯有冯·瓦兰修斯属地在异形入侵中安然无恙。有传言说，行商浪人不知用什么手段，和异形首领达成了交易。这个说法盘踞幸存者们的内心长达数十年之久。

languages.text: Quelques années plus tard, l'assaut des hordes ennemies fit trembler les Étendues. Sur ordre de leurs seigneurs arrogants, les tombeaux d'une civilisation disparue depuis bien longtemps s'éveillèrent pour mater les races inférieures et les diriger d'une main de fer. À l'issue de cette guerre, quoique victorieuse, contre un ennemi qui ne connaissait ni la faiblesse ni la peur, les dynasties Winterscale et Chorda se retrouvèrent au bord de l'extinction. Seul le protectorat von Valancius s'en sortit indemne, un miracle qui alimenta pendant des décennies des rumeurs selon lesquelles {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} avait réussi à négocier avec les dirigeants des xénos.
languages.original_text: A few years later, the Expanse quaked under the onslaught of enemy hordes. Heeding the orders of their arrogant overlords, the tombs of a long-dead civilisation awakened to bring the inferior races back into submission and rule with an iron hand. Victory over an enemy that knew neither weakness nor fear drove both the Winterscale and Chorda dynasties to the brink of extinction. Only the von Valancius protectorate survived the xenos unscathed, and rumours that the Rogue Trader had somehow managed to negotiate with their leaders plagued the minds of the survivors for decades after.

traits.locale_text: Quelques années plus tard, l'assaut des hordes ennemies fit trembler les Étendues. Sur ordre de leurs seigneurs arrogants, les tombeaux d'une civilisation disparue depuis bien longtemps s'éveillèrent pour mater les races inférieures et les diriger d'une main de fer. À l'issue de cette guerre, quoique victorieuse, contre un ennemi qui ne connaissait ni la faiblesse ni la peur, les dynasties Winterscale et Chorda se retrouvèrent au bord de l'extinction. Seul le protectorat von Valancius s'en sortit indemne, un miracle qui alimenta pendant des décennies des rumeurs selon lesquelles {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} avait réussi à négocier avec les dirigeants des xénos.

languages.text: Unos años después, la Extensión temblaba bajo el asalto de las hordas enemigas. Bajo las órdenes de sus arrogantes Señores Supremos, las tumbas de una civilización perdida despertaron para subyugar una vez más a las razas inferiores y gobernarlas con mano de hierro. La victoria sobre un enemigo que no conocía ni la debilidad ni el miedo llevó a las dinastías Winterscale y Chorda al borde de la extinción. El protectorado von Valancius fue el único en salir ileso del asalto xenos, y los rumores de que su Comerciante Independiente había conseguido de alguna forma negociar con sus líderes plagaron las conversaciones de los supervivientes durante décadas.
languages.original_text: A few years later, the Expanse quaked under the onslaught of enemy hordes. Heeding the orders of their arrogant overlords, the tombs of a long-dead civilisation awakened to bring the inferior races back into submission and rule with an iron hand. Victory over an enemy that knew neither weakness nor fear drove both the Winterscale and Chorda dynasties to the brink of extinction. languages.text: Birkaç yıl sonra Enginlik, düşman ordularının saldırısı altında sarsıldı. Kibirli efendilerin emirlerine kulak veren çoktan ölmüş bir medeniyetin mezarları, aşağı ırkları yeniden itaate zorlamak ve demir bir yumrukla yönetmek için uyandı. Ne zayıflık ne de korku bilen bir düşmana karşı kazanılan zafer, hem Winterscale hem de Chorda hanedanlıklarını yok oluşun eşiğine getirdi. Zeno saldırısından yara almadan kurtulan bir tek von Valancius protektorası oldu. Hür Tacir'in bir şekilde onların liderleriyle müzakere etmeyi başardığına dair söylentiler, hayatta kalanların zihinlerini on yıllar boyunca rahatsız etti.
languages.original_text: A few years later, the Expanse quaked under the onslaught of enemy hordes. Heeding the orders of their arrogant overlords, the tombs of a long-dead civilisation awakened to bring the inferior races back into submission and rule with an iron hand. languages.text: Einige Jahre später bebte die Ausdehnung angesichts der Invasion feindlicher Horden. Auf Befehl ihrer arroganten Hochlords erwachten die Gräber einer lange toten Zivilisation, um die niederen Völker aufs Neue zu unterwerfen und mit eiserner Hand zu herrschen. Der Sieg über einen Feind, der weder Schwäche noch Furcht kannte, brachte die Dynastien derer von Winterzunder und Chorda an den Rand der Auslöschung. Lediglich das Protektorat derer von Valancius überlebte die Xenos unversehrt, und Gerüchte, wonach {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} mit ihren Anführern verhandelt hatte, plagte noch jahrzehntelang die Gemüter der Überlebenden.
languages.original_text: A few years later, the Expanse quaked under the onslaught of enemy hordes.
